title: Ralph-style agent loop with verify step
why: Reduces review cycles with explicit sufficiency checks before merge
how_to_steps: Clone the repo and read the verify criteria docs
Add a GOAL.md with sufficiency rules for your team
Run one feature branch through the loop
Track PR review rounds for one week
evidence: Team reported 2x PR throughput in primary post
try_monday: Add verify step to one agent workflow on a small PR
